case_title: JOHN MCGARY VS. DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-22-865789, CSM-22-865791 WITH CASE CSM-22-865788; ALL FURTHER ENTRIES UNDER CASE CSM-22-865788
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);SERVICE ALSO FOR SC-103, SC-109 SERVED JUL-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON AUG-30-2022 IN DEPT. 506 - PLAINTIFF JOHN MCGARY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LOUISA MENDOZA, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP IS NOT PRESENT. COURT ORDERS THAT RELATED CASES CSM-22-865788, CSM-22-865789 AND CSM-22-865791 JOHN MCGARY VS DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP ARE CONSOLIDATED. THE LEAD CASE SHALL BE CSM-22-865788 JOHN MCGARY VS DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP. JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN THE LEAD CASE. ALL FURTHER ENTRIES ARE TO BE IN THE LEAD CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
